response.justification: Candidate is a capable full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded work, but the role demands 8 years of C++ and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems leadership. C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments a decade ago, and recent experience centers on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang rather than cloud compute platforms. No evidence of formal technical leadership of a compute platform or production cloud architecture at the required scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development experience
Hands-on with low-latency, high-throughput services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of req/sec)
Active community contributor: workshops, open-source frameworks, and conference talks
concerns: Far short of 8 years C++ — only ~6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015
No demonstrated technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers on a compute platform
Limited production cloud architecture footprint; primary cloud exposure is AWS CDK for a pricing module

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform leadership
